title: Atlas Finds the Rainbow Colors
synopsis: Little Atlas discovers colorful objects hidden around his home through peek-a-boo play, learning about red, blue, yellow, and green while enjoying repetitive surprises that delight young readers.

pages.text: Atlas looks around. Where are the colors hiding?

illustration.description: Cheerful toddler Atlas with warm brown skin and curly black hair stands in a bright playroom, hands on hips in a searching pose. He wears a soft yellow shirt and blue overalls. The room has white walls with colorful storage bins barely visible. His large brown eyes sparkle with curiosity.
illustration.alt: Atlas looking around a playroom searching for hidden colors

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Red apple goes crunch, crunch!

illustration.description: Atlas holds a bright red apple with both hands, taking a big bite with a delighted expression. Apple juice glistens on his chin. Behind him, his grandmother with silver hair and dark skin wearing a floral apron smiles warmly. The kitchen has soft yellow walls and wooden counters.
illustration.alt: Atlas eating a red apple with his grandmother watching

pages.text: Atlas looks around. What color comes next?

illustration.description: Atlas walks through a sunny living room with his arms stretched out, still searching. His father, a tall man with olive skin and dark beard, sits reading on a cream-colored sofa. Soft natural light streams through sheer curtains, creating a warm, peaceful atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Atlas searching for colors while his father reads nearby

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Blue ball goes bounce, bounce!

illustration.description: A bright blue rubber ball bounces high in the air while Atlas claps his hands with joy below. His neighbor friend Maya, a girl with light brown skin and pigtails, catches the ball with a big grin. They play on soft green grass in a backyard with white picket fence.
illustration.alt: Atlas and Maya playing with a bouncing blue ball

pages.text: Atlas looks around. More colors to find!

illustration.description: Atlas peers around a doorway into his bedroom, one eye visible as he peeks. His room has pale lavender walls with a wooden crib and colorful mobile hanging above. Stuffed animals sit on a low bookshelf. Soft afternoon light creates gentle shadows.
illustration.alt: Atlas peeking around his bedroom door looking for colors

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Yellow duck goes splash, splash!

illustration.description: Atlas sits in a white bathtub filled with bubbly water, holding a bright yellow rubber duck. Water droplets fly as he makes the duck splash. His mother with curly auburn hair and freckled skin kneels beside the tub, laughing. Steam rises gently from the warm bath.
illustration.alt: Atlas playing with yellow duck in bubble bath

pages.text: Atlas looks around. One more color hiding!

illustration.description: Atlas crawls on hands and knees across a soft carpet, looking under furniture. His cat Whiskers, a orange tabby, sits nearby watching curiously. The living room has warm beige tones with family photos on side tables and a cozy reading corner.
illustration.alt: Atlas searching under furniture while his cat watches

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Green blocks go stack, stack!

illustration.description: Atlas sits cross-legged stacking bright green wooden blocks into a tall tower. His concentration is intense as he carefully places each block. Around him are scattered colorful toys on a rainbow play mat. Sunlight streams in, highlighting his focused expression and the vibrant green blocks.
illustration.alt: Atlas stacking green blocks into a tower

pages.text: Atlas found all the colors! Red, blue, yellow, green!

illustration.description: Atlas sits surrounded by all his colorful discoveries - the red apple, blue ball, yellow duck, and green blocks. His whole family gathers around him on the floor: grandmother, father, and mother, all smiling proudly. The room glows with warm light as Atlas claps his hands in triumph.
illustration.alt: Atlas celebrating with family surrounded by all the colorful objects

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color is Atlas's apple?
questions.explanation: Atlas found a red apple that goes crunch, crunch!

questions.question: Where does Atlas play with the yellow duck?
questions.explanation: Atlas plays with the yellow duck in his bubble bath!

questions.question: What does Atlas do with the green blocks?
questions.explanation: Atlas stacks the green blocks - stack, stack!
